name: The Shrine of the Raven Queen
description: A circle of black stones surrounds a weeping willow. Ravens perch on the branches, watching you with unnerving intelligence.

discovery.message: Through the swamp mist, you spot a circle of ancient black stones.

approach.text: The air is cold and still. The ravens track your every move. A large stone altar sits at the center of the circle.

choices.label: [Good] Pray for the lost souls of the swamp.
[Evil] Offer blood to the ancient stones.
[Intelligence 14] Study the weathered runes on the stones.
[Resolve 14] Meditate in the center of the circle.

pray-good.text: The ravens caw in unison. You feel a sense of clarity and protection.

offer-blood.text: The stones pulse with a dark light as your blood hits the altar. Power flows through you, but it feels hungry.

offer-blood-result.text: The dark power settles in your bones.

study-runes.text: You trace the carvings with your fingers.
study-runes.success_text: The runes speak of the cycle of life and death. You gain a deeper understanding of the world's hidden mechanics.
study-runes.failure_text: The carvings are too weathered to read.

study-success.text: Your mind expands with new knowledge.

meditate.text: You sit cross-legged and close your eyes, ignoring the whispers of the ravens.
meditate.success_text: You find a moment of perfect stillness. Your mental fatigue vanishes.
meditate.failure_text: The whispers become screams in your mind. You can't maintain your focus.
